summary: Admin Wallet Top-up feature fully tested. Backend: 21/21 tests PASSED. Frontend: All components verified working correctly.

backend_tests.stats_structure: PASS - Stats has totalTopUps, totalAmount, totalBonus, newCustomers
backend_tests.search_user_structure: PASS - Users have id, email fields
backend_tests.history_returns_paginated_data: PASS - Returns topups, total, page, pages
backend_tests.history_pagination_params: PASS - Accepts page and limit params
backend_tests.full_topup_flow: PASS - Complete flow: search -> topup -> verify

admin_panel_tab.description: '💳 Wallet Aufladen' tab visible in Admin Panel sidebar

tab_navigation.description: Clicking tab loads AdminWalletTopup component correctly

stats_cards.description: 4 stats cards: Aufladungen heute (4), Gesamtvolumen (€95.00), Ausgezahlte Boni (€3.90), Neue Kunden (2)

customer_search.description: Search input with placeholder, search button, results display

recent_topups.description: 'Letzte Aufladungen' showing recent transactions with amounts and bonuses

frontend_component.AdminWalletTopup: Fully functional with all UI elements
frontend_component.tab_integration: Properly integrated in Admin.js at line 1181 (tab) and 1743-1745 (render)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend router properly validates min (€1) and max (€10,000) amounts
Bonus calculations are correct: 2% customer bonus + €1 first-topup bonus
Frontend component properly displays all stats, search, and recent topups
Tab navigation works correctly via data-testid='tab-wallet-topup'
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Wallet Top-up feature fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs at /api/admin/wallet-topup/* all working. Frontend component AdminWalletTopup.js integrated in Admin.js. Tab label is '💳 Wallet Aufladen'. Stats show real data from previous test topups. Test credentials: admin@bidblitz.ae / Admin123!
